$comment: Crew active abilities (M10). One per role, triggered from the travel crew panel; config-driven costs/effects/cooldowns. Pure resolution in src/sim/abilities.ts.

abilities.name: Rally Crew
abilities.desc: The Commander steadies the crew. +35 Morale. (3-Sol cooldown)

abilities.name: Jury-Rig
abilities.desc: The Engineer patches the hull from scrap — no part needed. +25 Hull, −10 Power. (4-Sol cooldown)

abilities.name: Deep Prospect
abilities.desc: The Geologist surveys ahead, priming the next EVA for a richer haul. −8 Power. (5-Sol cooldown)

abilities.name: Emergency Harvest
abilities.desc: The Botanist forces an early hydroponic yield. +120 Rations, −60 Water. (4-Sol cooldown)
